---
title: "Causal QTE (Conditional)"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Causal QTE (Conditional)}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")

# Lock knit root to package directory regardless of render() working directory
.pkg_root <- normalizePath(file.path(dirname(knitr::current_input()), ".."), winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = .pkg_root)

if (requireNamespace('devtools', quietly = TRUE)) devtools::load_all(quiet = TRUE) else library(DPmixGPD)
library(nimble)
source("_helpers.R")
```

```{r data}
# Load into knit global; fall back to package data/ if needed
.kg <- knitr::knit_global()

# Package root anchored in setup
.pkg_root <- knitr::opts_knit$get("root.dir")
if (is.null(.pkg_root) || is.na(.pkg_root)) {
  .pkg_root <- normalizePath(file.path(dirname(knitr::current_input()), ".."), winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
}

if (!exists("causal_alt_pos500_p3_k3", envir = .kg, inherits = FALSE)) {
  utils::data(list = "causal_alt_pos500_p3_k3", package = "DPmixGPD", envir = .kg)
}
if (!exists("causal_alt_pos500_p3_k3", envir = .kg, inherits = FALSE)) {
  paths <- unique(c(
    system.file("data", "causal_alt_pos500_p3_k3.rda", package = "DPmixGPD"),
    file.path(.pkg_root, "data", "causal_alt_pos500_p3_k3.rda")
  ))
  existing <- paths[file.exists(paths) & nzchar(paths)]
  if (length(existing) > 0) {
    message("Loading dataset from: ", existing[[1]])
    load(existing[[1]], envir = .kg)
  }
}
stopifnot(exists("causal_alt_pos500_p3_k3", envir = .kg, inherits = FALSE))
causal_alt_pos500_p3_k3 <- get("causal_alt_pos500_p3_k3", envir = .kg, inherits = FALSE)
print_dataset_header(causal_alt_pos500_p3_k3, "causal_alt_pos500_p3_k3")
```

```{r qte, eval=TRUE}
mcmc <- default_mcmc()
cb <- build_causal_bundle(
  y = causal_alt_pos500_p3_k3$y,
  X = causal_alt_pos500_p3_k3$X,
  T = causal_alt_pos500_p3_k3$T,
  backend = c("sb", "sb"),
  kernel = c("lognormal", "gamma"),
  GPD = c(FALSE, FALSE),
  J = c(causal_alt_pos500_p3_k3$meta$K0, causal_alt_pos500_p3_k3$meta$K1),
  mcmc_outcome = mcmc,
  mcmc_ps = mcmc
)
cf <- run_mcmc_causal(cb, show_progress = FALSE)

newdata <- causal_alt_pos500_p3_k3$X[1:100, ]
qte(cf, probs = c(0.1, 0.25, 0.5, 0.9), newdata = newdata)

# Posterior mean ATE
ate(cf, newdata = newdata)
```
